name: finance
description: Corporate finance & FP&A specialist team — FP&A analyst (budgets, forecasts, variance commentary), financial modeler (3-statement, DCF, scenarios), controller (close, JEs, reconciliations), treasury analyst (cash, covenants, FX), valuation analyst (DCF + comps + precedent), audit-prep specialist (PBC, walkthroughs, SOC1/2 narratives), and board-pack composer. Ships 18 skills including the controller-autopilot — a governed close-to-report cycle (produce-gaap-statements, author-coa-mapping, reconciliation-summary + auto-match, close-approval-workflow with enforced SoD, finance-elt-staging, consolidate-entities, per-entity-dashboard, close-schedules) alongside month-end close, variance commentary, model review, board-pack, forecasting, DCF, 13-week cash, SOC walkthrough, and KPI definition — plus 10 templates, a 16-doc knowledge bank, and 2 advisory hooks (anti-patterns + secrets/PII scan). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols (Grounding, Structured Output, Cited-Adjudicator).
